{{Quote|Are you trying to goad me into a fight, Jedi?|Myck'chur Finux Zug|<ref name="Star Wars (1998) 15" />}}
'''Myk'chur Finux Zug''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Lannik (species)/Legends|Lannik]] revolutionary, and a major power in the [[Red Iaro/Legends|Red Iaro]] terrorist group. During an attempt on the lives of the Prince of Lannik and the diplomat parents of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and [[Jedi High Council/Legends|council]] member [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]], he encountered the Lannik Jedi Master [[Even Piell/Legends|Even Piell]], suffering several wounds at the Jedi's hands before fleeing. He served as the leader of the [[Red Iaro/Legends|Red Iaro]] delegation to the peace talks with the Royal House of [[Lannik/Legends|Lannik]], but harbored a much darker purpose behind the scenes of the negotiations.

During his time on Malastare, Zug formed a clandestine alliance with the planet's corrupted [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Aks Moe/Legends|Aks Moe]], who had seen an opportunity to line his own pockets through a Red Iaro controlled, newly industrialized and resource rich [[Lannik/Legends|Lannik]]. Zug also recruited a number of [[Order of the Ffib|Ffib priests]] to his cause, as well as Piell's friend, [[Hutar Zash]].

Ostensibly sent to [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] to negotiate a peace treaty with Prince [[R'cardo Sooflie IX]], in reality Zug intended to assassinate the unpopular Prince to simultaneously remove a major threat to the Red Iaro political position and win support from the Lannik population.

When the Red Iaro's plans to kill the Prince using [[Akk dog/Legends|Akk dogs]] procured from [[Circus Horrificus/Legends|Circus Horrificus]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] failed, Zug tried to escape them by igniting his rocket backpack and fleeing the Prince's hotel. He flew out in the midst of the [[Vinta Harvest Classic/Legends|Vinta Harvest Classic]] podrace, and was sucked into the intake turbines of [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba's]] [[Podracing/Legends|podracer]] and killed.
